highlights.headline: Watch - Campbelle's six takes WI closer to victory
highlights.description: Shemaine Campbelle steps out and smashes a six to take West Indies closer to the finish line

highlights.headline: Watch - Campbelle's six brings up her fifty
highlights.description: Shemaine Campbelle launches one into the stands off the bowling of Kerr to bring up a half century

highlights.headline: Watch - WI's winning moment
highlights.description: Claxton scampers through for a quick single, as West Indies seal a 7-wicket win vs NZ with one ball to spare

highlights.headline: Watch - Devine's jaw-dropping shot
highlights.description: Sophie Devine loses balance while attempting a sweep shot, but somehow still manages to connect well

highlights.headline: Women's T20 World Cup highlights - Mix-up leads to Qiana Joseph's dismissal
highlights.description: Qiana Joseph and Hayley Matthews in a yes-and-no game to gift New Zealand a wicket

highlights.headline: Watch - Matthews survives, then hits four
highlights.description: Hayley Matthews is put down at cover, and she follows it up with a boundary

highlights.headline: Watch - Kemp's strikes derails SL chase
highlights.description: Freya Kemp runs through SL's lower-middle order to hand England a firm advantage

highlights.headline: Watch - Athapaththu skies it, Wyatt-Hodge holds on
highlights.description: Dani Wyatt-Hodge takes a good catch to dismiss Sri Lanka's skipper early

highlights.headline: Watch - Wyatt swats it over point for four
highlights.description: Dani Wyatt-Hodge shows intent early in her innings, finding the vacant areas in the field with ease

highlights.headline: Women's T20 World Cup - Amy Jones sweeps one for maximum
highlights.description: Amy Jones gets down on one knee and heaves the ball over the leg-side fence for a six

highlights.headline: Wyatt-Hodge brings up an incredible 100 vs SL
highlights.description: Dani Wyatt Hodge finds the boundary to bring up a match-winning century vs Sri Lanka in the 2026 Women's T20 WC

details.shortText: de Lange to Juairiya Ferdous, OUT
details.text: finally something to celebrate for Netherlands! Ferdous has cut that straight to point and it has taken Netherlands three catches to send her back

details.shortText: de Lange to Nigar Sultana, OUT
details.text: two in two for de Lange, the captain is gone first ball! Tossed up generously, lovely dip in front of the batter's eyes on off stump, Nigar drives across the line and misses completely. Just what the doctor ordered (sorry, couldn't resist)

details.shortText: SNL Siegers to Dilara Akter, OUT
details.text: That's a legbreak for the connoisseurs and punters alike! 77ks, drifts in towards middle and leg, hits the fuller side of length and rips away to hit off. Dilara stood in front of middle looking to defend straight. Ball's release from well beyond the perpendicular may have had Dilara to play a straighter angle, what transpired was 0.22 degrees of drift and 3.47 degrees turn as per the ball-tracking graphic

Length on off, flicked towards midwicket. Bowler runs across and has a direct hit at the non-striker's on the full. Sent upstairs. Mostary didn't get up for a while after sliding her bat... and the triple-angle replay shows why! Bat's not on the crease when the bails light up! Netherlands have two in two overs and are right back.
what a riposte from Marufa! She stifles Molkenboer a little with the tighter line, sends down a scrambled seam on short of length and Molkenboer pokes away from the body to edge it behind

details.shortText: Fariha Trisna to HDJ Siegers, OUT
details.text: edged behind, sharp catch from Nigar because she's standing up and is Trisna fired up or what!. Not her greatest delivery, as it's wide, but at least not full. Heather goes for a big swing to leg but only gets a faint edge

strikes first ball and what a way to get her 50th T20I wicket! A ripper without much flight, straight down the off stump line, beats Kalis for pace and knocks top of off. What a sight for a spinner. Kalis is stunned with her feet spread wide on the pitch!

Nearly a three-way collision! Marufa runs towards cover and takes it as point and cover converged. Cover ducked and ran past the bowler as she stretched forward and took it. Scramble-seam length ball well outside off. Rijke looked to drag it leg side with a flat-bat, ball ballooned right up. Marufa throws the ball up in excitement

Spooned to mid-off!. A bit of a juggle from Dilara as the ball came low to her left. She was on one knee, took it and tumbled bat. Ball around the fuller side of length. Angled in towards leg and may have straightened. Khurana looked to punch it straight, didn't check the shot, got it off the outer-half

wicket.shortText: c Dilara Akter b Ritu Moni

details.shortText: Fariha Trisna to de Leede, OUT
details.text: Pitched up outside off, driven to mid-off. Overdijk took off while de Leede stood still as the direct hit came in from Shorna. She was quick to run in and hit side on. Bat well behind the crease

details.shortText: Ritu Moni to de Leede, 1 run, OUT
details.text: Pitched up on off, flicked to deep midwicket. Fifty and out for de Leede! She tipped it just past the ring, deep midwicket charged in. It was Zwilling who called for the run. De Leede committed but had to make a bit of extra ground

details.shortText: Sanjida Akter Meghla to de Lange, OUT
details.text: Middle stump hit three fourth of the way up. Touch back of length, skidded through. De Lange showed all stumps and looked to pull it. No room, so couldn't extend her arms. Beaten. Sanjida does a horizontal A with her fingers in celebration
finally something to celebrate for Netherlands! Ferdous has cut that straight to point and it has taken Netherlands three catches to send her back
details.shortText: de Lange to Juairiya Ferdous, OUT

details.text: finally something to celebrate for Netherlands! Ferdous has cut that straight to point and it has taken Netherlands three catches to send her back

media.headline: Watch - Ferdous smashes one over midwicket
media.description: Highlights from the Women's T20 World Cup match between Netherlands and Bangladesh

details.shortText: Sadia Iqbal to Shafali Verma, OUT
details.text: what a comeback! Backed herself to cramp Shafali for room, and succeeds. Bowls length on middle and leg, Shafali backs away to cut but is cramped for room as the ball keeps coming in, gets the faintest of edges that is well pouched by the wicketkeeper.

taken on the second attempt! Rodrigues looks to heave this full delivery into the leg-side, but gets a top-edge that is taken by Natalia Parvez at extra cover after a brief bobble. The angle was taking the ball away and Rodrigues may have been better off trying to go over the off-side. Pakistanis in the crowd are absolutely buzzing. A wicket off her second ball on T20 World Cup debut for Rubab.

wicket.shortText: c Natalia Pervaiz b Tasmia Rubab

details.text: Third time lucky for Pakistan and this is a well-judged catch by who else but captain Fatima Sama. Mandhana departs after a brilliant 68 but has she done the damage already? Shamim tosses this up outside off, Mandhana charges down the track in a bid to clear long-on. Gets it right of the cue-end of the bat and Sana rushes in and takes the catch inches off the turf

wicket.shortText: c Fatima Sana b Rameen Shamim

details.text: Fulmali's innings lasts all of three balls. Lovely delivery from Sadia. Gently floats this on middle stump and deceives Fulmali in flight who came charging down the track trying to send this ball out of Edgbaston. Misses it and Muneeba completes a smart stumping.

Captain gets captain and that is a lovely catch at the deep square leg boundary! That was there to be hit and Harman got a good piece of that, but just not enough power behind it. Length ball on middle and leg, she flicks and for all money, that seemed to be going the distance. But Natalia settled under it and calmly completed the catch

wicket.shortText: c Natalia Pervaiz b Fatima Sana

details.text: Sana ends Ghosh's cameo, but I suspect the damage has been done! Scrambled seam length ball on off stump, Ghosh backs away eyeing another swipe across the line. She completely misses the ball and sees her off pole pegged back

reverse swept straight to Bharti Fulmali at point! Got to wonder if that was a risk worth taking. But again, Deepti has reaped the rewards for stringing together dot deliveries. India will breathe a huge sigh of relief, Pakistan were beginning to run away up top.
swept straight to short fine leg. Mandhana had to react quickly and she did really well to get her fingers underneath the ball diving forward. That was struck really hard.

details.shortText: Shree Charani to Saira Jabeen, OUT
details.text: leading edge to short cover! That's as easy as they come. A dream wicket for a left-arm spinner. She looks to work it against the turn, but the ball turns away to take the leading edge. India on the ascendancy.

A direct hit from Deepti. Has she found Muneeba short? India look confident and they have their reasons. Muneeba is just short of her crease. BullsEye from Deepti and Muneeba is finally out of here and that's a big, big wicket for India. Floated outside off, Natalia squeezes this off the outside edge as she hurtles down the track. She runs with the shot and Muneeba responds. But Deepti at backward point runs to her left, collects cleanly and then nails a direct hit

details.shortText: Shafali Verma to Fatima Sana, OUT
details.text: Shafali takes three balls to strike and Pakistan are quickly losing their way. Fatima Sana, the captain, falls for a three-ball duck. Tossed up well outside off stump, Sana had the room and frees her arms to clear covers. But she doesn't get it anywhere near the middle. Bunts it straight to Mandhana, who makes no mistake.

details.shortText: Shree Charani to Natalia Pervaiz, OUT
details.text: Another one bites the dust. If Mandhana picked up the previous catch, Harman gets into the act now. Tossed up fuller on off stump, Natalia looks to go inside out over covers by shimmying down the track. She gets too close to the pitch of the ball and despite getting a decent connection, doesn't get the elevation. Harmanpreet at extra cover takes a smart catch over her head

details.shortText: Shree Charani to Rameen Shamim, OUT
details.text: Oh, that is a top grab from Patil at backward point and Pakistan lose their seventh. Charani slows this up and gets some help from the surface with the ball turning away from Shamim. She jumps down the track looking to loft over covers. Instead, she skews it off the outside edge with the ball lobbing to the right of Patil who sprints, dives and takes a good catch

Straight down deep midwicket's throat and Deepti has her third. Gently flighted on middle and leg, Riaz goes across the line but doesn't generate any power behind the shot. Rodrigues is a few metres inside the boundary line and takes a simple catch

Four for the rockstar Deepti and Pakistan are fading very quickly. Tossed up outside off stump, she crashes this across the line but only as far as Rodrigues at cow corner who makes no mistake. Deepti has four!

DEEPTI SHARMA, you beauty! Five wickets for the star allrounder and India have defeated Pakistan comprehensively by 64 runs! This game has finished in a hurry and it is fitting that Deepti bags the final wicket. Tossed up on off, she sweeps this straight to Harmanpreet at short midwicket. All smiles as Harmanpreet hugs Deepti. Pakistan have been bowled out for 106 and India have two important points.

what a comeback! Backed herself to cramp Shafali for room, and succeeds. Bowls length on middle and leg, Shafali backs away to cut but is cramped for room as the ball keeps coming in, gets the faintest of edges that is well pouched by the wicketkeeper.
details.shortText: Sadia Iqbal to Shafali Verma, OUT

details.text: what a comeback! Backed herself to cramp Shafali for room, and succeeds. Bowls length on middle and leg, Shafali backs away to cut but is cramped for room as the ball keeps coming in, gets the faintest of edges that is well pouched by the wicketkeeper.
details.shortText: Sadia Iqbal to Shafali Verma, OUT

reverse swept straight to Bharti Fulmali at point! Got to wonder if that was a risk worth taking. But again, Deepti has reaped the rewards for stringing together dot deliveries. India will breathe a huge sigh of relief, Pakistan were beginning to run away up top.

media.description: Highlights from the Women's T20 World Cup match between India and Pakistan

details.text: swept straight to short fine leg. Mandhana had to react quickly and she did really well to get her fingers underneath the ball diving forward. That was struck really hard.
swept straight to short fine leg. Mandhana had to react quickly and she did really well to get her fingers underneath the ball diving forward. That was struck really hard.

leading edge to short cover! That's as easy as they come. A dream wicket for a left-arm spinner. She looks to work it against the turn, but the ball turns away to take the leading edge. India on the ascendancy.
details.shortText: Shree Charani to Saira Jabeen, OUT

details.text: leading edge to short cover! That's as easy as they come. A dream wicket for a left-arm spinner. She looks to work it against the turn, but the ball turns away to take the leading edge. India on the ascendancy.
details.shortText: Shree Charani to Saira Jabeen, OUT

media.headline: Watch - Sree Charani strikes in her first over
media.description: Highlights from the Women's T20 World Cup match between India and Pakistan

media.headline: Watch - Sree Charani strikes in her first over
media.description: Highlights from the Women's T20 World Cup match between India and Pakistan

details.text: Another one bites the dust. If Mandhana picked up the previous catch, Harman gets into the act now. Tossed up fuller on off stump, Natalia looks to go inside out over covers by shimmying down the track. She gets too close to the pitch of the ball and despite getting a decent connection, doesn't get the elevation. Harmanpreet at extra cover takes a smart catch over her head
details.shortText: Shree Charani to Natalia Pervaiz, OUT

details.text: Another one bites the dust. If Mandhana picked up the previous catch, Harman gets into the act now. Tossed up fuller on off stump, Natalia looks to go inside out over covers by shimmying down the track. She gets too close to the pitch of the ball and despite getting a decent connection, doesn't get the elevation. Harmanpreet at extra cover takes a smart catch over her head
details.shortText: Shree Charani to Natalia Pervaiz, OUT

media.headline: Watch - Harmanpreet holes out to deep midwicket
media.description: Captain gets captain: Fatima Sana bags the key wicket of Harmanpreet Kaur

details.text: Shafali takes three balls to strike and Pakistan are quickly losing their way. Fatima Sana, the captain, falls for a three-ball duck. Tossed up well outside off stump, Sana had the room and frees her arms to clear covers. But she doesn't get it anywhere near the middle. Bunts it straight to Mandhana, who makes no mistake.
details.shortText: Shafali Verma to Fatima Sana, OUT

details.text: Shafali takes three balls to strike and Pakistan are quickly losing their way. Fatima Sana, the captain, falls for a three-ball duck. Tossed up well outside off stump, Sana had the room and frees her arms to clear covers. But she doesn't get it anywhere near the middle. Bunts it straight to Mandhana, who makes no mistake.
details.shortText: Shafali Verma to Fatima Sana, OUT

media.headline: Watch - Harmanpreet holes out to deep midwicket
media.description: Captain gets captain: Fatima Sana bags the key wicket of Harmanpreet Kaur

details.text: Straight down deep midwicket's throat and Deepti has her third. Gently flighted on middle and leg, Riaz goes across the line but doesn't generate any power behind the shot. Rodrigues is a few metres inside the boundary line and takes a simple catch

Straight down deep midwicket's throat and Deepti has her third. Gently flighted on middle and leg, Riaz goes across the line but doesn't generate any power behind the shot. Rodrigues is a few metres inside the boundary line and takes a simple catch

Oh, that is a top grab from Patil at backward point and Pakistan lose their seventh. Charani slows this up and gets some help from the surface with the ball turning away from Shamim. She jumps down the track looking to loft over covers. Instead, she skews it off the outside edge with the ball lobbing to the right of Patil who sprints, dives and takes a good catch
details.shortText: Shree Charani to Rameen Shamim, OUT

details.text: Oh, that is a top grab from Patil at backward point and Pakistan lose their seventh. Charani slows this up and gets some help from the surface with the ball turning away from Shamim. She jumps down the track looking to loft over covers. Instead, she skews it off the outside edge with the ball lobbing to the right of Patil who sprints, dives and takes a good catch
details.shortText: Shree Charani to Rameen Shamim, OUT

media.headline: Watch - Patil's stunner to dismiss Shamim
media.description: Highlights from the Women's T20 World Cup match between India and Pakistan

media.headline: Watch - Patil's stunner to dismiss Shamim
media.description: Highlights from the Women's T20 World Cup match between India and Pakistan

details.text: DEEPTI SHARMA, you beauty! Five wickets for the star allrounder and India have defeated Pakistan comprehensively by 64 runs! This game has finished in a hurry and it is fitting that Deepti bags the final wicket. Tossed up on off, she sweeps this straight to Harmanpreet at short midwicket. All smiles as Harmanpreet hugs Deepti. Pakistan have been bowled out for 106 and India have two important points.

DEEPTI SHARMA, you beauty! Five wickets for the star allrounder and India have defeated Pakistan comprehensively by 64 runs! This game has finished in a hurry and it is fitting that Deepti bags the final wicket. Tossed up on off, she sweeps this straight to Harmanpreet at short midwicket. All smiles as Harmanpreet hugs Deepti. Pakistan have been bowled out for 106 and India have two important points.

media.headline: Watch - Deepti wraps up India's win
media.description: The allrounder also completed her five-for with the last wicket

media.headline: Watch - Deepti wraps up India's win
media.description: The allrounder also completed her five-for with the last wicket

media.headline: Watch - Ghosh smashes Rubab for six
media.description: She clears long-on with a big swing of the bat

details.text: Four for the rockstar Deepti and Pakistan are fading very quickly. Tossed up outside off stump, she crashes this across the line but only as far as Rodrigues at cow corner who makes no mistake. Deepti has four!

Four for the rockstar Deepti and Pakistan are fading very quickly. Tossed up outside off stump, she crashes this across the line but only as far as Rodrigues at cow corner who makes no mistake. Deepti has four!

media.headline: Watch - Shafali's first-ball six
media.description: The India opener kicks off their innings with a six over long-off

status.summary: ENG Women won by 4 wkts (15b rem)

details.text: tries to clear the covers, holes out on the edge of the ring! Jones strode into the length, but didn't quite get there. One hand came off the bat as the blade twisted on impact. Lewis tracked back to gather coolly over her shoulder

both openers gone in the same fashion! More drift from Maguire, into the advances of Wyatt-Hodge's thrashing blade. Just 46mph as the ball dipped in her arc. Lewis on the edge of the ring at wide mid-off steadies herself and pockets a dolly! DWH never looked comfortable against her angles...

yorker, clean through her! Good lord, that's got the Ireland fans jumping! She rolled her fingers on release, Capsey was suckered by the pace as much as the length, and played all around it ... think Harmison to Clarke in 2005, but without quite such a lack of subtlety!

full, pinned on the front shin... not given! Ireland review, though, and this looked close. Knight was trying to get forward, beaten past the inside edge. What does Hawk-Eye say? Thudding into leg stump! N Janani has to overturn her decision, and Prendergast has another

boshed through midwicket! Sciver-Brunt gets one away to the boundary, though she's helped by a bit of a fumble in the deep. Okay, now NSB is walking off. Looks like she has opted to retire... not clear for what reason, but she's done her work. Update: England have confirmed she retired hurt

tossed up and punched to cover, they look to scamper through - but Kemp is short at the striker's end! Good work from Hunter to collect the throw and dive for the stumps. England wobbling towards the finish line here!

splat! There's the first wicket, and it's a bit of a give-away from Hunter. A pre-meditated sweep to a delivery that was only ever headed for the top of off... round the wicket, more habitual drift and drip, shaping in and nailing its target!

great catch at short backward square! Lewis played a pre-meditated scoop to her first ball, stepping outside off to meet the full and fast delivery aimed at the base of middle stump. She nailed the timing, but Knight timed her leap to perfection too, hopping on the edge of the ring to snaffle the chance and leave Ireland in deep doo-doo now!
attempts to break the shackles, picks out cover! A skip, a slap, a slice... low to Kemp on the edge of the ring, and once again England's catching looks sharp. Ireland lose their third

gallops past it this time! Stokell's sluggish knock comes to a clinical end. Faster and flatter from Ecclestone, beating an attempted charge on the inside-edge. Jones gathers and breaks the stumps in a single movement

back of a length, under-edged into off stump! A bit of a long-hop if truth be told, but Gibson won't care! Prendergast got lazy with her footwork, thrashed with an angled bat while still crease-bound, and shot herself in the foot of off stump!

plopped to mid-on! Tector jumps down the track and tries to put the hammer down, but only succeeds in picking out England's captain for a head-height catch. Scrambled seam from Gibson and it skids on to the inner half of the bat. Ireland lose their sixth

flicks across the line, hit on the pads - given! Thought it might have been a touch leg side but Paul isn't hanging around to find out. Perfect length, dropping at the last moment as she tried to get forward, then spinning down the line of leg stump

sliced to backward point! No celebration from Ecclestone. She's all business. Tossed up, gives it some air and the ball grips, finds the edge of the bat as Kelly aims a slog down the ground, Knight is a safe pair of hands on the edge of the ring

plinked over Ecclestone's head... straight to the fielder! Slow and loopy delivery and Murray's eyes light up only for her to spoon the ball up into the nigh sky. Capsey runs across from mid-on and takes a simple catch

tries to clear the covers, holes out on the edge of the ring! Jones strode into the length, but didn't quite get there. One hand came off the bat as the blade twisted on impact. Lewis tracked back to gather coolly over her shoulder
